speaker: Jancy
text: Objection! This letter was found at the scene of the crime near the candle, clearly burned.

speaker: Ella
text: Oh...I remember! It did burn something. But it only burned it down the middle. I have the other piece of that paper!
The letter is from the mysterious person named Cassandra's mother, telling her that those expenses are exactly the amount of money the family would need to become the richest in the city.
